name: florines-place
description: A shared family cabin app for Florine's Place on Hood Canal.

scripts.preview:live: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_MODE=live opennextjs-cloudflare build --config wrangler.jsonc --env live && opennextjs-cloudflare preview --config wrangler.jsonc --env live
scripts.preview:demo: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_MODE=demo opennextjs-cloudflare build --config wrangler.jsonc --env demo && opennextjs-cloudflare preview --config wrangler.jsonc --env demo
scripts.deploy:live: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_MODE=live opennextjs-cloudflare build --config wrangler.jsonc --env live && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env live -- --keep-vars
scripts.deploy:demo: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_MODE=demo opennextjs-cloudflare build --config wrangler.jsonc --env demo && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env demo -- --keep-vars
